description: Retrieval golden set: each case pairs a realistic user query with the technique card slugs that are correct answers for it. Slugs must exist in packs-out/rag-techniques.pack. Scored by eval_retrieval.rs (hit@5, recall@10, MRR).

cases.query: I want keyword search and vector search combined so exact error codes and product names still match
The right passage is retrieved but buried around rank 12 — how do I push it to the top?
Retrieved chunks feel fragmented, the model is missing the surrounding sentences from the page
How should I pick a chunk size? Fixed 500-token chunks feel arbitrary for my documents
Questions need connecting facts across many documents — relationships between entities matter
How do I measure whether my RAG pipeline is actually getting better over time?
The model hallucinates confidently when the retrieved chunks don't actually contain the answer
User queries are short and vague and retrieval misses — should I rewrite or expand them first?
Large corpus of long reports — I want retrieval to work from summaries down into the details
My PDFs are full of charts and images that users ask questions about
I want the system to decide on its own when to retrieve versus answer directly, more agent-like
Question answering over CSV tables of structured product data
